title: <div><font face="ZapfDingbatsITC">✔</font> “The Phoenix Challenge” – Verbally de
content:
✔ “The Phoenix Challenge” – Verbally defend a past assignment in front of the class.
✔ “The Hero’s Return” – Debate another student on a major course theme to reclaim XP.

✅ Why This Works:
• Encourages students to maintain engagement.
• Allows students to recover from setbacks without erasing accountability.
• Ties performance to literary themes (trials, failures, redemption).

📜 6. Sabotages & Saves – Strategic Player Interactions

📜 Each week now has mechanics for sabotage & salvation.

✔ A character can attempt to sabotage another, forcing them to take on an extra challenge.
✔ A character can also “save” another, preventing them from suffering the penalty.

Example: Week 10 – Existentialism & The Absurd
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 188 (chunk 188/555)
